description: Domain of the associated company if present.

label: Company
description: Name of the associated company if present.

name: hs_associated_contact_email
label: Associated Contact Email
description: Email of the associated contact if present.

name: hs_associated_contact_firstname
label: Associated Contact First Name
description: First name of the associated contact if present.

name: hs_associated_contact_lastname
label: Associated Contact Last Name
description: Last name of the associated contact if present.

name: hs_calls_attempted_count
label: Attempted calls count
description: Number of non-connected calls made to to lead. This exclusively powers our templated automation.

name: hs_calls_connected_count
label: Calls Connected Count
description: The number of associated calls that are considered to be 'connected'

name: hs_company_analytics_source
label: Primary company analytics source
description: The latest analytics source from the lead's primary company at the time when the company was associated with the lead. This property will not be updated after the first rollup.

name: hs_company_analytics_source_data_1
label: Primary company analytics source first drilldown
description: The first drilldown of the latest analytics source from the lead's primary company at the time when the company was associated with the lead. This property will not be updated after the first rollup.

name: hs_company_analytics_source_data_2
label: Primary company analytics source second drilldown
description: The second drilldown of the latest analytics source from the lead's primary company at the time when the company was associated with the lead. This property will not be updated after the first rollup.

name: hs_company_is_target_account
label: Is Target Account
description: Associated company's status about being marketed or sold to.

name: hs_company_last_activity_date
label: Company Last Activity Date
description: The date of the last activity, rolled up from the primary associated company.

name: hs_company_last_engagement_timestamp
label: Company Last Engagement Date
description: The last time a contact engaged with your site or a form, document, meetings link, or tracked email. This doesn't include marketing emails or emails to multiple contacts.

name: hs_company_last_engagement_type
label: Company Last Engagement Type
description: The type of the last engagement a company performed. This doesn't include marketing emails or emails to multiple contacts.

name: hs_company_last_webpage_visit_timestamp
label: Company Time of Last Session
description: Time of the last session attributed to any contacts that are associated with this lead's primary company

name: hs_company_next_activity_date
label: Company Next Activity Date
description: The date of the next activity, rolled up from the primary associated company.

name: hs_company_next_activity_type
label: Company Next Activity Type
description: The type of the next activity, rolled up from the primary associated company.

name: hs_company_num_webpage_views
label: Company Number of Pageviews
description: Total number of page views across all contacts associated with this lead's primary company

name: hs_company_timezone
label: Associated company timezone
description: The associated company's timezone, if present.

name: hs_contact_analytics_source
label: Primary contact analytics source
description: The latest analytics source from the lead's primary contact at the time when the contact was associated with the lead. This property will not be updated after the first rollup.

name: hs_contact_analytics_source_data_1
label: Primary contact analytics source first drilldown
description: The first drilldown of the latest analytics source from the lead's primary contact at the time when the contact was associated with the lead. This property will not be updated after the first rollup.

name: hs_contact_analytics_source_data_2
label: Primary contact analytics source second drilldown
description: The second drilldown of the latest analytics source from the lead's primary contact at the time when the contact was associated with the lead. This property will not be updated after the first rollup.

name: hs_contact_buying_role
label: Contact Buying Role
description: Associated contact's role during the sales process.

name: hs_contact_job_title
label: Associated contact job title
description: Job title of the associated contact if present.

name: hs_contact_last_activity_date
label: Contact Last Activity Date
description: The date of the last activity, rolled up from the primary associated contact.

name: hs_contact_last_engagement_timestamp
label: Contact Last Engagement Date
description: The last time a contact engaged with your site or a form, document, meetings link, or tracked email. This doesn't include marketing emails or emails to multiple contacts.

name: hs_contact_last_engagement_type
label: Contact Last Engagement Type
description: The type of the last engagement a contact performed. This doesn't include marketing emails or emails to multiple contacts.

name: hs_contact_last_webpage_visit_timestamp
label: Contact Time of Last Session
description: Timestamp for start of the most recent session for this lead's primary contact to your website.

name: hs_contact_next_activity_date
label: Contact Next Activity Date
description: The date of the next activity, rolled up from the primary associated contact.

name: hs_contact_next_activity_type
label: Contact Next Activity Type
description: The type of the next activity, rolled up from the primary associated contact.

name: hs_contact_num_webpage_views
label: Contact Number of Pageviews
description: Total number of page views this lead's primary contact has had on your website

name: hs_contact_timezone
label: Associated contact timezone
description: The associated contact's timezone, if present.

name: hs_created_by_user_id
label: Created by user ID
description: The user who created this record. This value is set automatically by HubSpot.

name: hs_createdate
label: Object create date/time
description: The date and time at which this object was created. This value is automatically set by HubSpot and may not be modified.

name: hs_emails_connected_count
label: Emails Connected Count
description: The number of associated emails that are considered to be 'connected'

name: hs_emails_connected_count_v2
label: Connected emails count v2
description: Number of incoming non-OOO emails to the lead. This exclusively powers our templated automation.

name: hs_last_activity_date
label: Last Activity Date
description: The date of the last activity. Defaults to the date of the primary associated contact. If not present, looks to the date of the primary associated company.

name: hs_last_engagement_timestamp
label: Last Engagement Date
description: If primary contact exists, the last time the contact engaged with your site or a form, document, meetings link, or tracked email. This doesn't include marketing emails or emails to multiple contacts. Otherwise it is the last time for the associated company

name: hs_last_engagement_type
label: Last Engagement Type
description: If primary contact exists, the type of the last engagement the contact performed. This doesn't include marketing emails or emails to multiple contacts. Otherwise it is the type of the last engagement for the associated company

name: hs_last_webpage_visit_timestamp
label: Lead Time of Last Session
description: If the associated contact exists, the timestamp for the start of the most recent session for this contact to your website. Otherwise the timestamp for the start of the most recent session for the associated company to your website.

name: hs_lastmodifieddate
label: Object last modified date/time
description: Most recent timestamp of any property update for this object. This includes HubSpot internal properties, which can be visible or hidden. This property is updated automatically.

name: hs_lead_associated_deal_pipeline_stage
label: Associated Deal Pipeline Stage
description: The pipeline stage of the primary associated deal

name: hs_lead_associated_deals_count
label: Associated deals
description: Number of associated deals for a given lead.

name: hs_lead_call_count
label: Call Count
description: The number of calls made to this lead

name: hs_lead_closed_won_deals_amount
label: Closed won deal amount
description: The total amount of the lead's associated deals that are closed-won

name: hs_lead_communication_count
label: Message Thread Count
description: The number of message threads (SMS, LinkedIn, WhatsApp) opened with this lead

name: hs_lead_currency_code
label: Currency
description: Currency code for most recent associated deal

name: hs_lead_disqualification_note
label: Lead Disqualification Note
description: A note on why the lead was disqualified

name: hs_lead_disqualification_reason
label: Disqualification Reason
description: Dropdown list of reasons for disqualification

name: hs_lead_email_count
label: Email Count
description: The number of emails sent to this lead

name: hs_lead_first_outreach_date
label: First Outreach Date
description: The date of the first outreach (call, email, meeting or other communication) from the sales rep to the lead.

name: hs_lead_flow_id
label: Lead flow id
description: Flow id of the workflow that created this lead

name: hs_lead_import_unique_key
label: Import Unique Key
description: A key with format {importUUID}-{primaryAssociationObjectTypeId}-{primaryAssociationObjectId} that enforces idempotency on lead imports

name: hs_lead_inferred_pseudostage
label: Lead Inferred Pseudostage
description: This indicates the inferred lead pipeline pseudostage based on underlying activities taken by the user or lead.

name: hs_lead_is_disqualified
label: Is Disqualified
description: Indicates whether the lead is disqualified (with a value of 1) or not (with a value of 0). Hidden property that exists for the purpose of reporting.

name: hs_lead_is_in_progress
label: In progress leads
description: Indicates whether the lead is in progress (with a value of 1) or not (with a value of 0). Hidden property that exists for the purpose of reporting.

name: hs_lead_is_new
label: Is New
description: Indicates whether the lead is new (with a value of 1) or not (with a value of 0). Hidden property that exists for the purpose of reporting.

name: hs_lead_is_open
label: Open leads
description: Whether the lead's pipeline stage has any category other than `QUALIFIED` or `UNQUALIFIED`

name: hs_lead_is_open_v2
label: Is Open
description: Whether the lead's pipeline stage has category "Not started" or "In progress"

name: hs_lead_is_qualified
label: Is Qualified
description: Indicates whether the lead is qualified (with a value of 1) or not (with a value of 0). Hidden property that exists for the purpose of reporting.

name: hs_lead_label
label: Lead Label
description: Current status of a given lead

name: hs_lead_meeting_count
label: Meeting Count
description: The number of meetings booked with this lead

name: hs_lead_name
label: Lead Name
description: The full name of the lead.

name: hs_lead_name_calculated
label: Lead name calculated
description: The calculated full name of the lead.

name: hs_lead_outreach_activity_count
label: Outreach activity count
description: The total number of outreach activities (call, email, meeting or other communication) from the sales rep to the lead.

name: hs_lead_pipeline_value
label: Open deal amount
description: The total value of any open deals associated with this lead

name: hs_lead_primary_contact_owner
label: Primary Contact Owner

name: hs_lead_source

name: hs_lead_source_company_lifecycle_stage

name: hs_lead_source_contact_lifecycle_stage
